## Summary

Briefly describe what changed and why.

## Related issue

Link the issue this PR addresses (if any).

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Build/tooling change

## Testing

Describe what you tested and the result.

Examples:
- `./run-doc-reader`
- `python -m doc_reader /path/to/file.pdf --verbose`

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused and reviewed my diff.
- [ ] I updated docs when behavior changed.
- [ ] I did not include secrets or sensitive data.
